Baseline {{ "%.4f"|format(report.baseline.metric_value) }}
{% set is_improvement = (report.metric_direction == "higher" and report.best.metric_value > report.baseline.metric_value) or (report.metric_direction == "lower" and report.best.metric_value < report.baseline.metric_value) %} {% if report.improvement_pct %} {{ "%+.2f"|format(report.improvement_pct) }}% {% else %} No change {% endif %}
Best Result {{ "%.4f"|format(report.best.metric_value) }}

{{ report.best.description }}
